heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 430f–12 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out sections 430f–6 to 430f–12 of this title, including $3,000,000 for the construction of an interpretive center under .section 430f–5(d) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to repeal by .section 7 of Pub. L. 106–271section 430f–11 of this titlePub. L. 110–161
